findings: AC-1: cmdDescribe prints a fixed-width labeled text block to stdout via sequential console.log calls; falls through to natural exit 0. Verified: `node scripts/keel-state.cjs describe KEEL-103` exits 0 and prints the full summary block.
AC-2: first statement is readManifest(storyId) which calls die(1, 'FAIL: no manifest for story ...') to stderr and exits 1. Verified: `describe KEEL-MISSING` exits 1 with correct stderr message.

AC-3: local formatIdle(ms) helper — ms>=3_600_000 returns Xh Ym; else Xm Ys; both use Math.floor. Defensive guard: manifest.updated_at absent => 'unknown'. Verified: idle showed '2m 49s' then '1h 2m' across smoke-test runs, both branches exercised.

AC-4: completed phases from fs.readdirSync regex scan mapped via AGENTS[n-1]; remaining via expected_phases fallback chain; halted warning when manifest.halted===true; gate events from manifest.gate_events||0 / manifest.max_gates||DEFAULT_MAX_GATES. All fields visible in smoke-test output.
AC-5: cmdStatus (lines 446-468) and cmdStatusAll (lines 475-502) are byte-for-byte unchanged — confirmed by git diff. `status KEEL-103` and `status --all` outputs verified unchanged post-change.
Insertion point: cmdDescribe inserted immediately after cmdStatusAll closing brace (line 502), before cmdSnapshot — matches architecture decision.
Switch case added: `case 'describe': cmdDescribe(storyId); break;` placed after `case 'status'`.
USAGE string updated: 'describe' added to command list — verified in no-arg output.
Zero new npm dependencies: cmdDescribe uses only fs, path, AGENTS, SCOPES, DEFAULT_MAX_GATES — all pre-existing.
Unused variable removed: completedNames was declared but never referenced; removed before final smoke test.
conventions.md read: ADR-001 lock-free rule applied — cmdDescribe is lock-free per ADR-002.
lessons.md read: L-1 (hard-coded paths in user-facing strings) does not apply — no path literals in new strings, only the command name 'describe'.
Impact set: scripts/keel-state.cjs only (codegraph covers PHP classes; Node.js file is sole change). No dependents with untested coverage identified.

Test intelligence for phase 5: (1) happy path exits 0 + stdout structure; (2) missing story exits 1 + stderr text; (3) sub-hour idle format 'Xm Ys'; (4) multi-hour idle format 'Xh Ym'; (5) absent updated_at shows 'unknown'; (6) completed phases list accuracy; (7) remaining phases list; (8) halted=true shows WARNING; (9) gate events N/M display; (10) status and status --all JSON unchanged after describe added.
decisions: cmdDescribe is a standalone function (not an extension of cmdStatus) — AC-5 compliance is trivially verifiable because lines 446-502 are untouched.
formatIdle is a named function local to cmdDescribe scope, not promoted to module level — no other command needs idle-time formatting.
Lock-free per ADR-001/ADR-002: writeManifest is atomic (tmp+rename); a pure reader gains nothing from withLock and must not acquire it.
catch in completedLines mapping silently omits timestamp for unparseable phase files — correct behavior; a bad phase file would already have failed validate.
attemptsDisplay: empty attempts object shown as '0 failures' rather than '{}' for human readability.
